definitions.text: To suffer decomposition due to biological action, especially by fungi or bacteria.
examples: The apple left in the cupboard all that time had started to rot.

definitions.text: To decline in function or utility.
examples: Your brain will rot if you spend so much time on the computer, Tony!

definitions.text: To (cause to) deteriorate in any way, as in morals; to corrupt.
The process of becoming rotten; putrefaction.
Any of several diseases in which breakdown of tissue occurs.
